name: Fudge Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over 1 cup cut dates and the soda.
2. Add sugar, shortening (sifted), slightly beaten egg, and vanilla to the water-dates mixture.
3. Mix flour, cocoa, salt, nuts, and chocolate chips into the wet ingredients until combined.
4. Fill cupcake tins or liners about 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 to 24 minutes.
6. Makes approximately 20 to 24 cupcakes.
7. Frost if desired.
